name: law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient time log conversion causes delayed billing. We automate the formatting instead of manual formatting of billing statements.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of time logs into billing statements.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient conversion of time logs into billing statements.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient time log conversion causes delayed billing. We automate the formatting instead of manual formatting of billing statements.

one_liner: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient time log conversion causes delayed billing. We automate the formatting instead of manual formatting of billing statements.
